Create a TaskNotificationMessage

Source: R/types.R
TaskNotificationMessage.Rd

Create a TaskNotificationMessage

Usage

TaskNotificationMessage(
  subtype,
  data,
  task_id,
  status,
  output_file,
  summary,
  uuid,
  session_id,
  tool_use_id = NULL,
  usage = NULL
)

Arguments

subtype

Character.

data

List.

task_id

Character.

status

Character. "completed", "failed", or "stopped".

output_file

Character.

summary

Character.

uuid

Character.

session_id

Character.

tool_use_id

Character or NULL.

usage

List or NULL.

Value

Object of class c("TaskNotificationMessage","SystemMessage").
